description:
This quiz assesses proficiency with Regular Expressions, covering basic patterns, quantifiers, grouping, and advanced look‑around assertions. It is moderately challenging, offering a supportive tone that encourages practice and mastery. The content is instructional, reinforcing concepts through practical matching tasks.
Topics: Regular expression syntax, Quantifiers, Capture groups and non‑capturing groups, Look‑ahead and look‑behind assertions, Pattern validation
Audience: Developers, QA engineers, and students who have foundational programming knowledge and want to deepen their regex skills.
